name: lyra-analyze-codebase
description: MANDATORY codebase analysis skill. Single unified, language-agnostic, read-only skill covering architecture, security, performance, and code quality. Produces structured reports with P0–P3 severity-ranked findings. Five-phase workflow: map → patterns → risks → prioritize → report. Integrates with lyra-debug and lyra-clean-architecture. Unifies and supersedes analyze-codebase and analyze-project.
